few_shot_examples.output: The patient has a severe sore throat.
A heart attack was confirmed by checking the heart's electrical activity.

cases.clinical_notes: Patient diagnosed with essential hypertension. Prescribed 5mg Amlodipine daily. Advised to reduce sodium intake to <1500mg/day and engage in 150 minutes of moderate aerobic activity weekly.
Pediatric patient exhibits signs of exercise-induced bronchospasm. Albuterol sulfate inhaler prescribed, 2 puffs 15 minutes prior to physical exertion.
Adolescent patient presents with symptoms consistent with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus. HbA1c is 7.2%. Initiating Metformin 500mg BID with meals. Referral to endocrinology and clinical dietician placed.
